name: AWS CloudWatch Metrics Query
description: Query AWS CloudWatch for infrastructure metrics — CPU, memory, disk, network — with dimension and threshold filtering.

parameters.name: profile
parameters.description: AWS profile name from Cloud Profile context

parameters.name: service
parameters.description: CloudWatch namespace / service e.g. ec2, rds, lambda

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: AWS region — empty for default region

parameters.name: metric
parameters.description: CloudWatch metric name e.g. CPUUtilization, FreeStorageSpace, Errors — empty for all

parameters.name: dimensions
parameters.description: CloudWatch dimensions filter e.g. InstanceId=i-1234 — empty for all

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: resource tag filter e.g. Env=prod — empty for all

parameters.name: threshold
parameters.description: threshold condition e.g. >80, <20 — empty if no threshold

parameters.name: top
parameters.description: return top N results by value — 0 for all
